words.def: a United States youth subculture of the 1950s; rejected possessions or regular work or traditional dress; for communal living and psychedelic drugs and anarchism; favored modern forms of jazz (e.g., bebop)
words.zh: n. 音樂節拍；差拍振動；心臟跳動（beat的複數）

words.def: the supreme effort one can make
the cardinal compass point that is at 90 degrees
a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 日落, 同夥, 組合, 集合, 裝置
